gigapan.description:
Cyrogenic separation tower and auxiliary equipment building from the  Ames 3.5-foot hypersonic wind tunnel.  For more notes see http://gigapan.org/viewGigapan.php?id=12013

The vertical banding is because I took this at sunset.
